content:
### Database dev log
https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/database
It's a lot. And there is a lot left.
Only Awakeners supported for now, all of the tags/mechanics are missing descriptions, they'll be there eventually! There is some more features I want in (besides simply more content), but I think it's pretty neat <:pray:1356053116260454534> 
I forgot to update the WIP disclaimer... the popup is no longer very ugly, I think x)
